scenarios.label: Pick or pass
scenarios.description: Seat 5 holds 10C, KC, AD, QS, 7D, KH and must PICK or PASS. (Forced to pick for this capture — the checkpoint preferred PASS here.)

scenarios.label: Call a partner
scenarios.description: Seat 5 picked and now holds 10C, KC, AD, QS, 7D, KH, 7H, 8S (8 cards after the blind). It must choose a partner card — the two-tower CALL scorer is the live head here.

scenarios.label: Bury two cards
scenarios.description: Seat 5 (the picker) holds 10C, KC, AD, QS, 7D, KH, 7H, 8S and must bury its first card — the pointer head scores every hand slot.

scenarios.label: Lead trick 1
scenarios.description: Seat 1 (the partner) leads trick 1 with QD, JD, 9H, AS, 7C, JS. The trick is empty; memory now carries the pick phase.

scenarios.label: Follow late in the hand
scenarios.description: Trick 3: seat 4 (a defender) follows with JH, 9D, 10D, 8D after several cards hit the table. Trick tokens are live and the memory token carries every completed trick.
